scripts.build: vite build && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --pretty false && node -e "require('fs').copyFileSync('src/electron/preload.js','dist/electron/preload.js')" && npx esbuild src/electron/main.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --outfile=dist/electron/main.cjs --external:electron --banner:js="const __import_meta_url = require('url').pathToFileURL(__filename).href;" --define:import.meta.url=__import_meta_url
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p tsconfig.json --pretty false && tsc -p tsconfig.electron.json --pretty false
